projects.title: MediaApp
projects.summary: A full-featured local music player for Android built in Kotlin with XML layouts.
projects.description: MediaApp is a production-quality Android music player built entirely in Kotlin with traditional XML view layouts. It features a playlist system, queue management, smart playlists, album art via MediaStore, and an offline recommendation engine — all on-device, no internet required.
features: Smart playlists (Most Played, Recently Added, Favourites)
Offline recommendation engine using song audio features

projects.title: Turbo Music
projects.summary: A YouTube Music-style streaming app built in Python with KivyMD for Android.
projects.description: Turbo Music is a Python-based Android application that streams music from YouTube using the NewPipe Extractor approach. Built with Kivy/KivyMD, it features a dark/red YouTube Music-inspired UI, shuffle/repeat modes, and threaded stream fetching to keep the UI responsive.

projects.title: SSC Reasoning Practice
projects.summary: KivyMD app with 15+ deterministic question generators for SSC CGL/CHSL reasoning prep.
projects.description: A mobile-first practice application for SSC CGL and CHSL reasoning sections, built in Python with KivyMD. Generates unlimited unique questions for number series, coding-decoding, blood relations, analogies, and more using deterministic algorithms. Tracks progress with SQLite.
features: Number series, coding-decoding, blood relations, analogies

projects.title: TURBO DASH
projects.summary: A pseudo-3D segment-based car racing game built with Pygame for Android / Pydroid 3.
projects.description: TURBO DASH is a mobile-first racing game written in Python using Pygame. It uses perspective projection and trapezoid road bands to create a pseudo-3D driving experience. Built entirely on an Android phone using Pydroid 3.

projects.title: This Website
projects.summary: Personal digital headquarters. Pure HTML/CSS/JS, data-driven, managed via Telegram bot.
projects.description: sudipta.github.io — a zero-dependency personal website where all content is managed through a Telegram bot that writes to GitHub-hosted JSON files. No CMS, no database, no build step. Designed to be updated for years without touching frontend code.
features: Telegram bot CMS — add content from phone
Zero build step — works on GitHub Pages
